title: NYCIII Culture Media for Gardnerella vaginalis and other fastidious anaerobes
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"epfls","text":"NYCIII  (en-why-see-three) culture media","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"88fme","text":"Suitable for the culture of Gardnerella vaginalis","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"apf2u","text":"Heat inacticate your serum. Serum can kill many different types of bacteria.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: The quantities given are for 500 ml of liquid media.
Start thawing out a 50 ml conical of heat inactivated horse serum (Hemostat Labs shs500). Set aside for making solution B.

*To heat deactivate allow frozen serum to thaw at room temp. Once thawed, swirl to ensure serum is homogenous and transfer bottle to a 56C water bath (make sure water level does not extend above the cap). Incubate for 30 min, swirling every 5-10 minutes to ensure even heating. After incubation allow serum to return to room temp and sterile vacuum filter. To avoid multiple freeze-thaws aliquot the deactivated serum into 50ml conicals and store at -20C.
HEPES solution (Cellgro 25-060-Cl): 4.2 mililiters It is critical to use cell culture grade HEPES buffer
•Adjust solution A to a final pH of 7.3. I use 50% solution (~19M) of NaOH. It usually takes at least 200 ul to start approaching the proper pH.
•Use pH indicator strips for this, as the peptone will interfere with a pH probe
•Autoclave the solution. Normally I autoclave a 500 ml bottle for 45 minutes at 121C.
Let Solution A cool to near room temp (at least below 50C) prior to adding horse serum
•Pour the contents of the 50 ml conical into the cooled solution A.. Mix with a good swirl (or a stir bar).
•Pour the Soln A/horse serum mixture into a filter flask – sterile vacuum filter it.
•In order to achieve anaerobic conditions, the cap should be slightly loosened, and the flask left to equilibrate in the anaerobic chamber overnight.
creator: Warren G Lewis
